body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Previously, density was calculated by adiabatic extrapolation. When potential temperature is then calculated from temperature and density, the bulk Richardson number is constrained near neutral. 

This PR instead computes the surface density be hydrostatic extrapolation, which avoids this problem (and is more accurate). 

Increases default maxiter to ensure convergence after changes.

Closes #219

title: Fix surface_density calc to use hydrostatic extrapolation
